name: LCTITAN
summary: Lotte Chemical Titan Holding Berhad is a Malaysia-based integrated petrochemical producer. The company manufactures and sells a wide range of petrochemical products, including olefins, polyolefins, and aromatics, which are used in various industries such as packaging, automotive, and construction. Lotte Chemical Titan aims to be a leading petrochemical company in Southeast Asia, providing high-quality products to its customers.
